entry.key: Log level when file not found

value.name: Log level when file not found

entry.key: Log level when file not found

entry.value: D:\Projects\apache nifi\5G KPI Flow Processing System\CSV dataset
D:\Projects\apache nifi\5G KPI Flow Processing System\Dataset
SELECT cell_id, 'HANDOVER_HIGH' AS alert_type, handover_count AS "value", 5 AS threshold, packet_loss_pct, throughput_mbps, latency_ms FROM FLOWFILE WHERE CAST(handover_count AS DOUBLE) > 5
SELECT cell_id, 'LATENCY_HIGH' AS alert_type, latency_ms AS "value", 10 AS threshold, packet_loss_pct, throughput_mbps, handover_count FROM FLOWFILE WHERE CAST(latency_ms AS DOUBLE) > 10
SELECT cell_id, 'PACKET_LOSS_HIGH' AS alert_type, packet_loss_pct AS "value", 1 AS threshold, latency_ms, throughput_mbps, handover_count FROM FLOWFILE WHERE CAST(packet_loss_pct AS DOUBLE) > 1
SELECT cell_id, 'THROUGHPUT_LOW' AS alert_type, throughput_mbps AS "value", 50 AS threshold, latency_ms, packet_loss_pct, handover_count FROM FLOWFILE WHERE CAST(throughput_mbps AS DOUBLE) < 50
